title: Centred Doors
description: Moves all Minecraft doors to the exact center of their block for a cleaner, more symmetrical look.
body:
# **Centred Doors**

**Have you ever placed a door in Minecraft and thought, “Why does it sit on the edge of the block instead of in the middle?”**

## With Centred Doors:
![With Centred Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afc9b36550e066ba74950b69cb778bcbabeb654.png)

## Without Centred Doors (vanilla):
![Without Centred Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc0fcb753348fc0b0fb4bca7d8b73b19d8f258f.png)

**Centred Doors** fixes that by moving every door right into the **center of its block**, giving your builds a clean, symmetrical look that just feels right.

With the doors now perfectly aligned, you can connect them to glass panes (**using degug stick**), walls, and fences without those awkward gaps or misaligned edges — making creative building much smoother and more flexible.

This pack doesn’t just improve functionality; it also enhances the visual depth of your builds. Centered doors add a subtle sense of 3D realism and make walls feel more dynamic and layered, whether you’re designing a cozy base or a grand architectural masterpiece.

### _**Note: unfortunately, texture packs can’t modify the hitbox of doors — this change is purely visual.**_

**Small detail, big impact. Enjoy.**
